examples: He was attended, as are all heads of state, by a full panoply of experts.
This martial panoply belonged to the true prince--a recent present from Madam Parr the Queen.
A good deal of his blustering spirit seemed to have evaporated with the removal of his fine panoply.
There's a whole panoply of rules here, including capital gains taxes, one of your favorites.
You can now discuss the new risk to determine its place in your panoply of risks.
